reasoning: Both models confirmed PKGBUILD safety with static sources from trusted GitHub URLs and checksums. Failure to download sources (likely transient) doesn't indicate malice. No dangerous code paths in reviewed PKGBUILD.
coverage_issues: Failed to review AppImage/icon files due to download failure - critical gap as these execute during installation
false_negatives: Potential risks in unreviewed AppImage (could contain malicious payload) and install-time behavior
learnings: Improve source download reliability for binary analysis
Prioritize executable binaries over metadata files when present
Clarify in reports when critical files remain unanalyzed due to technical failures
